## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Security and permissions

- [ ] All client input is treated as untrusted.
- [ ] New actions have individual server-side permissions.
- [ ] Hierarchy checks are enforced where one user manages another.
- [ ] Administrative actions and failures are logged.

## Testing

Describe how the change was tested, including published multi-server testing when relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] No credentials or private identifiers included
